**Summary**

The submitted commands will be processed atomically in a single transaction. Moreover, each ``Command`` in ``commands`` will be executed in the order specified by the request. Protobuf type com.daml.ledger.api.v2.SubmitRequest

- Introduced: `3.4.8`

**Signature**

```text
public static final class CompletionOuterClass.Completion.Builder extends com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessageV3.Builder<CompletionOuterClass.Completion.Builder> implements CompletionOuterClass.CompletionOrBuilder
```

**Summary**

A completion represents the status of a submitted command on the ledger: it can be successful or failed. Protobuf type com.daml.ledger.api.v2.Completion

```text
public static final class EventOuterClass.ArchivedEvent.Builder extends com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessageV3.Builder<EventOuterClass.ArchivedEvent.Builder> implements EventOuterClass.ArchivedEventOrBuilder
```

**Summary**

Records that a contract has been archived, and choices may no longer be exercised on it. Protobuf type com.daml.ledger.api.v2.ArchivedEvent

<a id="type-com-daml-ledger-api-v2-eventouterclass-event"></a>

### `EventOuterClass.Event`

- Introduced: `3.4.8`
- Deprecated: -
- Removed: -

Upstream docs: [Open](https://javadoc.io/doc/com.daml/ledger-api-java-proto/3.4.11/com/daml/ledger/api/v2/EventOuterClass.Event.html)

**Signature**

```text
public static final class EventOuterClass.Event extends com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessageV3 implements EventOuterClass.EventOrBuilder
```

**Summary**

Events in transactions can have two primary shapes: - ACS delta: events can be CreatedEvent or ArchivedEvent - ledger effects: events can be CreatedEvent or ExercisedEvent In the update service the events are restricted to the events visible for the parties specified in the transaction filter. Each event message type below contains a ``witness_parties`` field which indicates the subset of the requested parties that can see the event in question. Protobuf type com.daml.ledger.api.v2.Event

**Signature**

```text
public static final class PackageReferenceOuterClass.VettedPackage extends com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessageV3 implements PackageReferenceOuterClass.VettedPackageOrBuilder
```

**Summary**

A package that is vetting on a given participant and synchronizer, modelled after ``VettedPackage`` in `topology.proto &lt;https://github.com/digital-asset/canton/blob/main/community/base/src/main/protobuf/com/digitalasset/canton/protocol/v30/topology.proto#L206&gt;`_, enriched with the package name and version. ### `PackageReferenceOuterClass.VettedPackage.Builder`

- Introduced: `3.4.8`
- Deprecated: -
- Removed: -

Upstream docs: [Open](https://javadoc.io/doc/com.daml/ledger-api-java-proto/3.4.11/com/daml/ledger/api/v2/PackageReferenceOuterClass.VettedPackage.Builder.html)

**Signature**

```text
public static final class PackageReferenceOuterClass.VettedPackage.Builder extends com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessageV3.Builder<PackageReferenceOuterClass.VettedPackage.Builder> implements PackageReferenceOuterClass.VettedPackageOrBuilder
```

**Summary**

A package that is vetting on a given participant and synchronizer, modelled after ``VettedPackage`` in `topology.proto &lt;https://github.com/digital-asset/canton/blob/main/community/base/src/main/protobuf/com/digitalasset/canton/protocol/v30/topology.proto#L206&gt;`_, enriched with the package name and version. Protobuf type com.daml.ledger.api.v2.VettedPackage

**Summary**

The list of packages vetted on a given participant and synchronizer, modelled after ``VettedPackages`` in `topology.proto &lt;https://github.com/digital-asset/canton/blob/main/community/base/src/main/protobuf/com/digitalasset/canton/protocol/v30/topology.proto#L206&gt;`_. The list only contains packages that matched a filter in the query that originated it. Protobuf type com.daml.ledger.api.v2.VettedPackages

- Introduced: `3.4.8`

**Signature**

```text
public static final class PackageServiceOuterClass.PackageMetadataFilter extends com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessageV3 implements PackageServiceOuterClass.PackageMetadataFilterOrBuilder
```

**Summary**

Filter the VettedPackages by package metadata. A PackageMetadataFilter without package_ids and without package_name_prefixes matches any vetted package. Non-empty fields specify candidate values of which at least one must match. If both fields are set, then a candidate is returned if it matches one of the fields. Protobuf type com.daml.ledger.api.v2.PackageMetadataFilter

### `PackageServiceOuterClass.TopologyStateFilter`

- Introduced: `3.4.8`
- Deprecated: -
- Removed: -

Upstream docs: [Open](https://javadoc.io/doc/com.daml/ledger-api-java-proto/3.4.11/com/daml/ledger/api/v2/PackageServiceOuterClass.TopologyStateFilter.html)

**Signature**

```text
public static final class PackageServiceOuterClass.TopologyStateFilter extends com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessageV3 implements PackageServiceOuterClass.TopologyStateFilterOrBuilder
```

**Summary**

Filter the vetted packages by the participant and synchronizer that they are hosted on. Empty fields are ignored, such that a ``TopologyStateFilter`` without participant_ids and without synchronizer_ids matches a vetted package hosted on any participant and synchronizer. Non-empty fields specify candidate values of which at least one must match. If both fields are set then at least one candidate value must match from each field. Protobuf type com.daml.ledger.api.v2.TopologyStateFilter

```text
public static final class ReassignmentOuterClass.UnassignedEvent.Builder extends com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessageV3.Builder<ReassignmentOuterClass.UnassignedEvent.Builder> implements ReassignmentOuterClass.UnassignedEventOrBuilder
```

**Summary**

Records that a contract has been unassigned, and it becomes unusable on the source synchronizer Protobuf type com.daml.ledger.api.v2.UnassignedEvent

<a id="type-com-daml-ledger-api-v2-stateserviceouterclass-getactivecontractsrequest"></a>

### `StateServiceOuterClass.GetActiveContractsRequest`

- Introduced: `3.4.8`
- Deprecated: -
- Removed: -

Upstream docs: [Open](https://javadoc.io/doc/com.daml/ledger-api-java-proto/3.4.11/com/daml/ledger/api/v2/StateServiceOuterClass.GetActiveContractsRequest.html)

**Signature**

```text
public static final class StateServiceOuterClass.GetActiveContractsRequest extends com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessageV3 implements StateServiceOuterClass.GetActiveContractsRequestOrBuilder
```

**Summary**

If the given offset is different than the ledger end, and there are (un)assignments in-flight at the given offset, the snapshot may fail with "FAILED_PRECONDITION/PARTICIPANT_PRUNED_DATA_ACCESSED". Note that it is ok to request acs snapshots for party migration with offsets other than ledger end, because party migration is not concerned with incomplete (un)assignments. Protobuf type com.daml.ledger.api.v2.GetActiveContractsRequest

<a id="type-com-daml-ledger-api-v2-stateserviceouterclass-getactivecontractsrequest-builder"></a>

### `StateServiceOuterClass.GetActiveContractsRequest.Builder`

- Introduced: `3.4.8`
- Deprecated: -
- Removed: -

Upstream docs: [Open](https://javadoc.io/doc/com.daml/ledger-api-java-proto/3.4.11/com/daml/ledger/api/v2/StateServiceOuterClass.GetActiveContractsRequest.Builder.html)

**Signature**

```text
public static final class StateServiceOuterClass.GetActiveContractsRequest.Builder extends com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessageV3.Builder<StateServiceOuterClass.GetActiveContractsRequest.Builder> implements StateServiceOuterClass.GetActiveContractsRequestOrBuilder
```

**Summary**

If the given offset is different than the ledger end, and there are (un)assignments in-flight at the given offset, the snapshot may fail with "FAILED_PRECONDITION/PARTICIPANT_PRUNED_DATA_ACCESSED". Note that it is ok to request acs snapshots for party migration with offsets other than ledger end, because party migration is not concerned with incomplete (un)assignments. Protobuf type com.daml.ledger.api.v2.GetActiveContractsRequest

### `TransactionFilterOuterClass.EventFormat`

- Introduced: `3.4.8`
- Deprecated: -
- Removed: -

Upstream docs: [Open](https://javadoc.io/doc/com.daml/ledger-api-java-proto/3.4.11/com/daml/ledger/api/v2/TransactionFilterOuterClass.EventFormat.html)

**Signature**

```text
public static final class TransactionFilterOuterClass.EventFormat extends com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessageV3 implements TransactionFilterOuterClass.EventFormatOrBuilder
```

**Summary**

A format for events which defines both which events should be included and what data should be computed and included for them. Note that some of the filtering behavior depends on the `TransactionShape`, which is expected to be specified alongside usages of `EventFormat`. Protobuf type com.daml.ledger.api.v2.EventFormat

### `TransactionFilterOuterClass.EventFormat.Builder`

- Introduced: `3.4.8`

Upstream docs: [Open](https://javadoc.io/doc/com.daml/ledger-api-java-proto/3.4.11/com/daml/ledger/api/v2/TransactionFilterOuterClass.EventFormat.Builder.html)

**Signature**

```text
public static final class TransactionFilterOuterClass.EventFormat.Builder extends com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessageV3.Builder<TransactionFilterOuterClass.EventFormat.Builder> implements TransactionFilterOuterClass.EventFormatOrBuilder
```

**Summary**

A format for events which defines both which events should be included and what data should be computed and included for them. Note that some of the filtering behavior depends on the `TransactionShape`, which is expected to be specified alongside usages of `EventFormat`. Protobuf type com.daml.ledger.api.v2.EventFormat

```text
public static final class TransactionOuterClass.Transaction.Builder extends com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessageV3.Builder<TransactionOuterClass.Transaction.Builder> implements TransactionOuterClass.TransactionOrBuilder
```
